BOSS Libraries Profile

Personal information is optional; you may use an ID instead.



OpenAI API Key

Optional. Add your own key to use OpenAI models; leave it blank when you use a local Ollama model.

The key is saved in this browser's local BOSS profile. It is not encrypted, so do not enter it on a shared device or include it in exports you plan to share.

BOSS Color Palette

Every appearance uses the approved BOSS Libraries colors. The folder at the end previews the file-shelf color for that appearance.

AI Voice

Developer Options

Model Preferences
